change: Move family linking to /family and remove child-level invite UI from /children
reason: Child-specific invite UI and state were removed from /children after family sharing moved to group scope.

change: Remove unused My Page card components
reason: Unused My Page card components and related imports were removed from the route bundle.

change: Add family linking page
reason: New /family route was introduced for group-level family sharing, so this records the initial bundle baseline.

change: Harden OAuth callback, profile seed retry, and auth form validation
reason: Auth page gained callback parsing, profile seed retry, recoverable error handling, and form validation logic.

change: Share auth session cache between AuthGate and logout flows
reason: AuthGate session cache was moved into a shared client utility and synced with fatal auth cleanup.

change: Share auth session cache between AuthGate and logout flows
reason: My Page logout now updates the shared auth session cache before redirecting to /auth.

change: Retry authenticated fetch once after 401 token refresh
reason: Home imports authedFetch, which now includes 401 token refresh and single retry support.

change: Return users to the original protected route after login
reason: Auth flow now sanitizes the next query parameter, preserves it through OAuth redirect, and routes completed users back to the original protected path.

change: Show a return-to-previous-screen notice on auth redirect
reason: Auth page now detects a safe next path and shows a notice explaining that login will return the user to the previous screen.

change: Show toast feedback for logout and expired sessions
reason: My Page logout now shows a success toast, while AuthGate shows a deduped warning toast when an authenticated request ends with a final 401.
